title: K-200 Nav/GNC Subsystem Specification
text:
# K-200 Nav/GNC Subsystem Specification

Document number: MD-DOC-480-A. Revision: A. Type: specification. Author: Jordan Kim. Created: 2023-04-16. Last modified: 2023-11-23. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Nav/GNC subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1151, P-1026, P-1087, P-1078.
